intents.summary: Keep the standing lane moving without waiting for new operator prompts.
intents.description: Default unattended operating mode. Finish the live standing lane, rotate to the next child issue, and proactively fill safe worker-slot capacity up to the checked-in four-lane cap.

intents.summary: Bias execution toward the current standing lane only.
intents.description: Use when the operator wants the current live PR merged before additional support-lane work expands.

intents.summary: Treat the current-head regression as the only immediate objective.
intents.description: Use when a required check is red on the current head and the lane should not widen until the regression is fixed.

intents.summary: Rebuild queue intake before implementation work resumes.
intents.description: Use when the queue has collapsed to epics or the standing label is missing and the next concrete child issue must be restored first.

intents.summary: Use available worker-slot capacity to cut or refresh one disjoint follow-up slice.
intents.description: Use when queue health needs another disjoint support lane prepared or refreshed while worker-slot capacity remains.

focuses.summary: Drive the current standing issue to merge.
focuses.description: Default focus for unattended execution. The standing label remains the source of truth for what to do next.

focuses.summary: Fix the current-head regression before widening scope.
focuses.description: Use when a current-head required check is red and the live lane must be stabilized immediately.

focuses.summary: Keep the queue populated with concrete child issues and merge-ready PRs.
focuses.description: Use for intake restoration, support-lane preparation, and anti-idle queue hygiene.

focuses.summary: Refresh machine-readable handoff state and standing-lane continuity.
focuses.description: Use when agent transition quality is the main concern and current code changes are secondary.

focuses.summary: Correct repo-law drift before feature work widens.
focuses.description: Use for standing-label drift, policy/helper drift, or contradictions between checked-in law and runtime behavior.

focuses.summary: Tighten the checked-in mission-control documentation and schema contract surfaces.
focuses.description: Use for schema/docs/catalog slices that define how future agents consume mission control.

overrides.description: Temporary override for repository-admin merge actions when queue/bootstrap edge cases block the normal path.
Temporary override to permit fork-base workflow dispatch when upstream-only dispatch guards would otherwise fail closed.
Historical compatibility override that allows or suppresses additional disjoint support-lane preparation without changing the hard max-active-lanes cap.
Tightens local Copilot CLI use for a given operator turn without allowing GitHub-hosted Copilot review to replace required checks.
Temporary override that requires project-board apply/reporting to run before the lane is considered complete.
